description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The exterior is predominantly white with large, evenly spaced windows on both floors, providing ample natural light. The front facade features a central entryway with double doors, flanked by two symmetrical trees and a paved walkway leading to the entrance. On one side, there is a spacious driveway with a car parked and a hedge boundary, while the other side has a grassy area. The rear and side views reveal multiple balconies and terraces, as well as a fenced parking area. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or stucco, with glass windows and some metal elements for railings and doors.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, a central entryway, and a driveway with a car and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two symmetrical trees, paved walkway, and the driveway with a car to the right.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the driveway, hedge boundary, and the back of the house with visible garage doors.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long, flat facade, multiple windows, and a terrace area with fencing.
description_view_3: Angled side/rear view showing the terrace, additional windows, and grassy area with trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with a paved walkway, flanked by two trees and a small step, no porch or overhang.
